summary: Created compact plan for model cross-restart resume safety and corrected invalid maturity from spec to planned.
Moved MPI-54 from todo to doing for implementation.
Fixed follow-up issues: pause/resume byte display, cold-start partial byte reporting, close-dialog cancel behavior, and hard cancel using NDH stop().
Recorded user verification and test evidence.
